ACM ASIACCS 2025

Home

The 20th ACM ASIA Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ACM ASIACCS 2025) will be held in Hanoi, Vietnam from 25-29 August 2025.

Building on the success of ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security (CCS), the ACM Special Interest Group on Security, Audit, and Control (SIGSAC) formally established the annual ACM Asia Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ASIACCS). The inaugural ASIACCS was held in Taipei (2006). Since then ASIACCS has been held in Singapore (2007), Tokyo (2008), Sydney (2009), Beijing (2010), Hong Kong (2011), Seoul (2012), Hangzhou (2013), Kyoto (2014), Singapore (2015), Xi’an (2016), Abu Dhabi (2017), Songdo (2018), Auckland (2019), Taipei (2020, virtual), Hong Kong (2021, virtual), Nagasaki (2022, hybrid), Melbourne (2023), and Singapore (2024).

Parade Rehearsals: Traffic Notice

Vietnam will celebrate the 80th anniversary of its National Day on September 2, 2025. In preparation, military parade rehearsals will take place in Hanoi, requiring temporary road closures during the following times:

  • August 24, 5:00 PM – August 25, 3:00 AM
  • August 27, 5:00 PM – August 28, 3:00 AM
  • August 29, 6:00 PM – August 30, 3:00 PM

During these times, vehicles will not be permitted on designated roads. However, buses and pedestrians will still have access, ensuring continued mobility. Further details can be found HERE.

Please note that these restrictions will not affect the conference, scheduled for August 25–29, 2025. Our organizing team is dedicated to providing a smooth and enjoyable experience for all attendees.

We appreciate your understanding and cooperation, and we look forward to welcoming you to Hanoi for a memorable and enriching conference experience.

Latest Updates

  • 18 August 2025: Proceedings of ACM ASIACCS 2025 is now available in the ACM Digital Library. It can be freely accessed via the conference website, starting from the conference date.
  • 13 August 2025: Handbook of ACM ASIACCS 2025 is now available for download.
  • 30 June 2025: ACM ASIACCS 2025 keynote speakers are confirmed.
  • 25 June 2025: The early-bird registration deadline is extended to 30 June, 23:59 (ICT).
  • 03 June 2025: The program at a glance and the full conference program have been finalized.
  • 25 May 2025: The registration for ACM ASIACCS 2025 is now opened. Early-bird registration is by 25 June 2025, 23:59 (ICT).
  • 15 May 2025: Papers accepted in Cycle 1 and Cycle 2 are released now!
  • 12 January 2025: Call for Nominations: ACM AsiaCCS 2025 – Test of Time Award
  • 6 January 2025: ACM AsiaCCS 2025’s submission site is open for Cycle 2 submissions
  • 15 October 2024: ACM AsiaCCS 2025’s list of accepted workshop proposals
  • 30 August 2024: ACM AsiaCCS 2025’s PC member list has been confirmed
  • 26 August 2024: ACM AsiaCCS 2025’s submission site is now open for Cycle 1 submissions
